headline: A Look At Amphenol's Valuation After Mixed Short And Long Term Share Returns
summary: Why Amphenol Is On Investors’ Radar Today Amphenol (APH) is drawing fresh attention as investors reassess the stock after recent share performance data, including a negative return in the past 3 months and a positive 1 year total return above 100%. See our latest analysis for Amphenol. The recent 3 month share price return of an 8.38% decline contrasts with a 1 year total shareholder return of 105.72%, suggesting longer term momentum remains strong even as shorter term sentiment cools.
